description: A treatment or medicine that cures disease or relieves pain; the answer to what ails. 'Heloa' names what resolves—the specific cure for specific suffering.
sound_symbolism: The word exhales ease. 'He' breathes out relief, pain releasing. 'Lo' opens to healing. Then 'a' completes with open release, ailment resolving.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'heloa' (the remedy). More specific than 'nepha' (medicine)—a remedy addresses a particular problem.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Right remedy for right problem—skillful means matching treatment to condition.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Remedies matched ailments—specific treatments for specific conditions, knowledge of correspondences.
